seo.title: Custom automation for professional service firms | Bekur
seo.description: Logic-first automation for professional service firms. One workflow per sprint — fixed scope, fixed price, hard AI cap, live in 3–6 weeks.

hero.headline: End AI hype fatigue. One workflow. Live in 3–6 weeks.
hero.subheadline: We map how your firm actually works — then ship custom automation into your existing stack, with a fixed price and a hard monthly AI spend cap written into scope.

pains.title: Rigid SaaS & template fighting
pains.description: You bend proprietary workflows to fit Clio, Harvey, TaxDome, or HoneyBook. The workflow is the asset — the tool should adapt.

pains.title: Opaque, skyrocketing AI costs
pains.description: Token and API bills scale faster than value. No architectural discipline. No cap in writing.

pains.title: Fragmented data silos
pains.description: Automation lives in one box while real work lives in email, spreadsheets, CRM, and legacy drives.

pains.title: Hype projects that fail
pains.description: Long cycles, unclear ROI, quietly shelved — budget, appetite, and team trust gone.

pains.title: Billable hour leakage
pains.description: Partners lose hundreds of hours a year to intake, document chase, reconciliation, and admin bloat.

sprintTeaser.title: The Automation Sprint
sprintTeaser.description: One production workflow. Fixed scope. Fixed price. 3–6 weeks.
